name: @storytree/art-authoring
description: The art-authoring organism (ADR-0225): the author-time, vendor-swappable generative-3D blocking-substrate adapter. A `(prompt, concept image) -> maquette` adapter that fans one request to swappable vendor backends (fixture offline; NVIDIA build.nvidia.com TRELLIS live, credential-gated), lets an author select one THROWN-AWAY maquette, and hands off ONLY a re-authored checkable vector asset the @storytree/procedural-architecture factory checker governs. Author-time ONLY — never in the deterministic build, the runtime, or per-instance; NEVER browser-bundled; carries node/network deps, so it is NOT a foundational port.
